description: Document in Judaeo-Arabic, apparently summarizing a petition. Headed ב, then "in which your slaves Abū l-Riḍā al-Abwānī asked Sayyidnā (=you) . . . the letter from al-Muʿaẓẓam to al-Qāḍī al-Makīn the overseer (mushārif) of Alexandria," then goes into the details of a request involving provisions (maʾūna). Dating: probably 13th century. Piyyuṭ and pen trials on verso.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
